labels.2: Lifting something up completely without letting it drop down
labels.3: Lifting something up completely, then letting it drop down
labels.4: Lifting something with something on it
labels.5: Lifting up one end of something, then letting it drop down
labels.8: Moving something away from the camera
labels.9: Moving away from something with your camera
labels.10: Moving something and something away from each other
labels.11: Moving something and something closer to each other
labels.12: Moving something and something so they collide with each other
labels.15: Pretending to turn something upside down

test.note: Reuses the public validation split for reporting because labels for the held-out SSv2 test split are not available in this project.
